start.welcome:
👋 Hello, *{name}*! Welcome to *ServerWatch*.

I monitor your server and answer questions about it using AI.

Use the buttons below or just type anything.

help.text:
ℹ️ *ServerWatch — Help*

*Commands*
/status — Current server metrics
/alerts — View and configure alert thresholds
/models — Available Ollama models
/help — Show this message

*How it works*
Just type a question in natural language and I will gather live metrics and answer using your local LLM.

*Example questions*
• What process is using the most CPU?
• How much free disk space is left?
• Is the server doing OK right now?

status.unavailable: ❌ Could not retrieve metrics. Is Glances running?

alerts.invalid_value: ❌ Invalid value. Please enter a number between 0 and 100.

models.no_models: ℹ️ No models found on the Ollama instance.
models.unavailable: ❌ Could not reach Ollama. Is the service running?
models.already_active: ℹ️ `{model}` is already the active model.

chat.error: ❌ Something went wrong while generating a response. Please try again.

errors.general: ❌ An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.service_unavailable: ⚠️ One or more services are unreachable. Check that Glances and Ollama are running.
